system.flavor: With well placed words, you rile up your foe into moving out of position.
system.effect:
Effect [X]: Gain shield. A foe in range is pulled 1, then must save or be pulled +1d3 spaces, become immobile, and become unable to take interrupts. These effect last until the start of their next turn.
Afflicted takes 2 piercing damage, or 2d3 if they are afflicted by 3 or more statuses.
